overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character in a suit and fedora exploring the interior corridors and exterior decks of the Titanic at dusk. The character transitions from dimly lit, wood-paneled hallways to an exterior deck with a dramatic purple sunset, eventually reaching a social area with other passengers gathered under string lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship cabin with riveted metal walls transitioning to paneled corridor

agents.ego_description: walking from the cabin through a doorway into a narrow interior corridor

entered.detail: red circular life preserver with white text reading TITANIC mounted on the metal wall
large wooden trunk with metal bands sitting against the wall
ornate wall-mounted electric light fixture casting warm yellow light
industrial metal wall panels with visible rivet patterns painted in cream color
open doorway leading to a corridor with red carpet visible beyond
cream-colored wooden wall panels with decorative molding

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a small cabin with riveted metal walls and a Titanic life preserver visible. The character walks through an open doorway into a narrow corridor with wood-paneled walls and warm electric lighting, transitioning from the industrial metal interior to a more refined hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: first-class corridor with wood paneling and red carpet

events.description: approaching the doorway at the end of the corridor leading to the exterior deck

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long corridor passing multiple cabin doors on both sides

entered.detail: dark wooden cabin doors with brass handles lining the corridor
red carpet runner with decorative borders covering the corridor floor

changed.to: multiple fixtures on both left and right walls

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, elegant corridor with cream-colored wood paneling and wall sconces. The red carpet runner extends the length of the hallway past multiple cabin doors. The segment ends as the character approaches the doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered promenade deck with staircase to upper level

events.description: exits the interior hallway onto the covered exterior deck with ocean view visible
begins ascending the exterior metal staircase to the upper deck level

agents.ego_description: walking across the covered deck and climbing the exterior stairs to the upper level, with the ocean and sunset visible

entered.detail: overhead covering of the promenade deck with decorative trim
white painted metal railing with decorative patterns along the deck edge
dark ocean water visible beyond the ship's railing
dramatic purple and orange sunset sky visible through the deck opening
metal staircase with railings leading up to the upper deck
upper structure of the ship with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character exits the interior onto a covered promenade deck where the ocean and a dramatic purple sunset become visible. The character passes a life preserver and storage chests before ascending an exterior metal staircase. The lighting shifts from warm interior to the mixed natural dusk light as the character climbs to the upper deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper deck social area with deck furniture and passengers

events.description: approaching a group of passengers gathered near deck tables under string lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper deck railing, approaching a social gathering with other passengers near deck furniture

notable_agents.action: passengers standing and conversing near deck tables under the string lights

entered.detail: warm glowing string lights hanging overhead along the deck
round wooden tables with white tablecloths arranged on the deck
wooden deck chairs and wicker furniture around the tables
bright searchlight beam cutting through the dusk sky from the ship

changed.to: deck edge railing with decorative white pattern

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto the open upper deck with a full view of the darkening sky and ocean. The deck is lined with string lights and deck furniture. As the character walks forward, other passengers become visible standing and conversing near the tables. A searchlight beam sweeps across the background, and the ship's superstructure rises on the left with warmly lit windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the industrial depths of a ship's interior toward the open air of a deck under a twilight sky. It begins in a small cabin with riveted metal walls and a life preserver, moving through an open doorway into a narrow, wood-paneled corridor illuminated by warm electric lighting. As the character proceeds, the space expands into a long, elegant hallway featuring cream-colored paneling and a red carpet runner that leads toward an exit. The scene then shifts from the refined interior to a covered promenade deck, where the warm artificial light gives way to the natural glow of a dramatic purple sunset over the ocean. Finally, the camera passes storage chests and a life preserver before ascending an exterior metal staircase to reach the upper deck.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from the ship's interior onto an expansive upper deck under a darkening twilight sky. It begins with the character emerging into the open air, revealing a wide vista of the deep ocean and the fading light of dusk. As the camera moves forward, the environment opens up to reveal deck furniture and glowing string lights, while passengers appear in the mid-ground conversing near tables. The scene then expands to show the ship's towering superstructure on the left with warmly lit windows, just as a sweeping searchlight beam cuts across the background.
